scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; the full Rocketlane surface (fields, forms, spaces, activities, task-lists, invoices, custom-field write endpoints, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /projects is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/tasks is a mutation endpoint; this bundle has no reviewed write record schema, approval risk, or legacy write contract for that operation
/fields is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/spaces is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
/invoices is an additional documented read resource not implemented by legacy; this bundle does not declare its stream schema, pagination contract, or fixtures
